# AlwanKit

> One color. A whole system. Pick a color, choose a harmony, and get a complete, WCAG-accessible color palette for your app or design system. Covering every role, every state, and every mode, in pure CSS with no JavaScript required.

AlwanKit is a free, open source color system generator built entirely on CSS custom properties. It takes a single base color and a harmony mode as input and outputs a full, production-ready design system palette. Primary, secondary, tertiary, surface variants, semantic colors, dark mode included, all accessible by default and exportable in multiple formats.

## Key Features

- **Harmony**: Supports complementary, triadic, analogous, and monochromatic harmony modes
- **WCAG accessible**: Every generated color automatically meets WCAG contrast standards, no manual checking required
- **Dark mode**: Light and dark themes are generated together from the same base color
- **Pure CSS**: Built entirely on CSS custom properties. No JavaScript, no runtime overhead, no layout shift
- **Export formats**: CSS custom properties, SCSS variables, Tailwind config, JSON
- **Open source**: Free to use, fork, and ship in personal and commercial projects

## Color Roles

AlwanKit generates the following color roles:

- **Primary / Secondary / Tertiary**: Main accent colors ordered by hierarchy, with container and on-color variants for each
- **Surface**: Background and layout colors with five levels of elevation (lowest, low, default, high, highest) plus a variant
- **Semantic**: Success, error, warning, and info. Each with container and on-color variants
- **On [color]**: Foreground (text/icon) tokens always paired with their background counterpart

## Pages

- **Home**: Overview, features, how it works, FAQ, and CTA
- **Colors**: Full generated palette listed with role names, values, and short descriptions
- **Examples**: UI components and blocks built using the generated palette (buttons, forms, cards, alerts, and more)
- **Explore**: A curated collection of ready-to-use palettes from popular brands
- **Export**: Code output with format switcher (CSS, SCSS, Tailwind, JSON) and copy/download actions

## How It Works

1. Pick a base color and harmony mode using the FAB color picker
2. AlwanKit derives the full palette using color theory and auto-adapts each color for WCAG compliance
3. Light and dark themes are generated simultaneously from the same base
4. Export the result in your preferred format and drop it into your project

## Technical Details

- Built entirely on CSS custom properties and the cascade, zero JavaScript
- Uses `oklch()` color model with clamped lightness and chroma for accessible output
- Dark mode handled via `[data-theme="dark"]` attribute on the root element
- Harmony offsets applied via `[data-harmony]` attribute
- Source code is self-contained and can be self-hosted

## Links

- Website: https://alwankit.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/BadreddineIbril/alwan-kit
